query:
SELECT 
  SUM(principal) as total_principal,
  SUM(interest) as total_interest,
  SUM(fee) as total_fee,
  SUM(penalty) as total_penalty,
  SUM(unlock_fee) as total_unlock_fee,
  SUM(overpaid) as total_overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt) as total_bad_debt,
  SUM(discount) as total_discount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_pt_amount,
  SUM(payment_tx_amount) as total_tx_amount,
  -- sum fields (รวม discount ด้วย)
  SUM(principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid) as sum_fields_no_bad_debt,
  -- sum fields - discount
  SUM(principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid - discount) as sum_fields_minus_discount,
  -- sum pt.amount + bad_debt
  SUM(total_amount) + SUM(bad_debt) as total_with_bad_debt,
  -- sum payment_tx_amount + bad_debt
  SUM(payment_tx_amount) + SUM(bad_debt) as tx_with_bad_debt
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
